description_long: This sculpture depicts a dynamic, muscular feline figure, possibly a panther or lion, captured in a dramatic pose with its body arched and both front paws raised as if in mid-roar or struggle. The animal's mouth is open, baring its teeth, and its head is thrown back, emphasizing the tension and energy in the pose. The tail curves around the base, and the entire figure is mounted on a textured rectangular plinth. The surface of the sculpture has a dark, metallic sheen, suggesting it is cast in bronze or a similar metal. The anatomical details, such as the musculature and claws, are rendered with expressive realism. The overall impression is one of power, movement, and raw emotion, making it a striking focal point in any urban setting.
description: A dark metallic sculpture of a roaring, muscular feline with raised paws and arched back, mounted on a textured base. The figure exudes energy and tension, with detailed anatomy and a dramatic pose.
description_view_0: View 0 shows the feline from a high front angle, highlighting the open mouth, raised paws, and muscular chest.
description_view_1: View 1 presents a side profile, emphasizing the arched back, extended limbs, and the curvature of the tail.
description_view_2: View 2 displays the opposite side, focusing on the elongated torso, tail, and the dynamic twist of the body.
description_view_3: View 3 offers a frontal perspective, showcasing the expressive face, outstretched arms, and the powerful stance.
attribute_location_context: No specific context is visible; the sculpture appears isolated without environmental cues.
